title: Toxicity
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y9t7vg5X/images/2e62874f957556377c09ea57f01d6a2c2fd9947b.png)

#  Toxicity Mod

Toxicity Mod adds a new treasure enchant. 

Grants an posion 1 effect for 3 seconds when mod attacked.

Can be applied on every sword and axe!

- ScreenShot from game.

![ScreenShot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y9t7vg5X/images/83f0fca3a210dc4512e17861c9abcb717dd2cad9.jpeg)
